pattern: Each output entry is a double index lookup, a direct application of array indexing over a permutation.
hints: The result at position i depends only on nums and two index lookups.
Read the value at i, then use that value as an index into nums again.
Return a new array where ans[i] = nums[nums[i]] for every i.

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    p = list(range(n))
    rng.shuffle(p)
    return [p]
